login.title: FASTpass® SPKD Login
login.subtitle: FASTpass® SPKD
login.description: A comprehensive solution for ICAO Local PKD provisioning, management, and Passive Authentication verification. Collects, validates, and synchronizes ePassport CSCA/DSC certificates from around the world through ICAO PKD and various diplomatic channels, and performs complete forgery detection of passport chip data during traveler immigration inspection.
login.failed: Login failed. Please try again later.
login.networkError: Login error. Please check your network connection.

features.pkdUploadDesc: Upload PKD LDIF/Master List files, parse and validate certificates, store in DB and LDAP.
features.paVerificationDesc: Upload ePassport chip SOD and Data Groups for ICAO 9303 PA verification.
features.certManagementDesc: Search stored CSCA/DSC/CRL certificates and export in various formats.
features.securityAuditDesc: RBAC access control, API Key authentication, PII encryption, and full audit trail for all operations.

profile.title: Profile
profile.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
profile.subtitle: User information and account settings
profile.changePasswordDesc: Change your password periodically for account security.
